searchSpaceId.title: Search Space ID
searchSpaceId.description: Logical search-space identifier used for DB derivation and run traceability. In local mode this is usually generated from search-space config.

startUrls.title: Start URLs
startUrls.description: List of Jobs.cz search-result URLs to crawl. In local mode this is usually generated from a checked-in search-space JSON file.

maxItems.title: Max Items
maxItems.description: Maximum number of job ads (detail pages) to scrape. Required to control costs.

maxConcurrency.title: Max Concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: Maximum number of parallel browser tasks for crawl processing.

maxRequestsPerMinute.title: Max Requests Per Minute
maxRequestsPerMinute.description: Global rate limit for outgoing crawl requests per minute.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Select proxies to be used by your crawler.

debugLog.title: Debug Logging
debugLog.description: Turn on verbose logging for debugging.

allowInactiveMarkingOnPartialRuns.title: Allow Inactive Marking On Partial Runs
allowInactiveMarkingOnPartialRuns.description: If false, a partial list scan must not mark missing jobs inactive during reconciliation. Recommended default is false.
